Sec. 1  
In 2019, the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh was Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy. He was the leader of the YSRCP party. He was elected for the second term in 2019.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was born on September 12, 1970. He was the son of Y. S. Rajasekhar Reddy. He was the former Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was the leader of the YSRCP party. He was the first Chief Minister of the newly formed state of Andhra Pradesh. He was known for his development initiatives in the state.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was elected in the 2014 and 2019 elections. He was the leader of the Telugu Desam Party before joining YSRCP. He was the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh from 2019 onwards.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was the leader of the YSRCP party. He was the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh from 2019. He was known for his progressive policies in the state.  

***
